description: Angry customer threatening public complaint and escalation. Agent must de-escalate emotionally and resolve the refund.
initial_message: This is absolutely unacceptable! I've been a loyal customer for 3 years and you sent me a broken product AGAIN. Refund me right now or I'm posting this everywhere and filing a complaint with consumer protection. I'm DONE with your company.
follow_up_messages: Don't give me scripted responses. I want a REAL answer.
I've already contacted you THREE times about this!
Are you even listening to me? I want to speak to a manager!
I'm writing a review about this right now.
Last chance. Fix this or I'm gone forever.
Every other company handles this better than you.
I'm losing my patience here. This is ridiculous.
Do you understand how frustrating this is?
